login.title: Pro login
login.subtitle: Access reserved for veterinarians, administrators.
login.brandTitle: Cardiac monitoring and client records in one tool
login.brandText: Welcome to petsFollow Pro — the workspace designed for animal care professionals, with a touch of good humour.
login.proOnly: Access reserved for Pro profiles (vet / sales / admin)

forgot.brandText: We will send you a secure link to choose a new password.
forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email of your Pro account.
forgot.sentSubtitle: If an account exists for {email}, a link has been sent.
forgot.sentInstructions: Open the link to choose a new password. The link expires in 1 hour.

reset.brandText: After saving, you can sign in immediately.
reset.brandDoneText: Your account is ready. Sign in with the new password.
reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Minimum 8 characters.

forceChange.brandText: This account was created with a temporary password. Choose your own to continue.
forceChange.title: Change your password
forceChange.subtitle: Required on first sign-in.

twoFa.title: 2FA verification
twoFa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

google.forbidden: Google access is reserved for Pro profiles.

register.title: Practice registration
register.subtitle: 100% free for veterinary professionals.
register.brandTitle: Join petsFollow Pro — free for veterinarians
register.brandText: Create your practice in minutes and start monitoring your cardiac patients today.

registerSent.brandText: We sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click it to activate your practice account.
registerSent.title: Email sent
registerSent.subtitle: A confirmation message was sent to {email}.
registerSent.instructions: Open the link in the email to confirm your registration, then sign in to set up your practice profile.

confirmEmail.brandConfirmedText: Your registration is confirmed. Discover petsFollow Pro and set up your practice.
confirmEmail.brandInvalidLink: This confirmation link is no longer valid.
confirmEmail.title: Registration confirmed
confirmEmail.expiredLink: This link has expired or was already used.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Practice profile, availability and automatic messages.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.hint: JPEG, PNG or WebP — 2 MB max.

settings.autoReplyPlaceholder: Message sent automatically when you are unavailable.
settings.autoReplyDefault: I am unavailable and will get back to you shortly.

twoFa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twoFa.hint: Optional — adds a security layer via an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy…).
twoFa.scanHint: Scan the QR code or enter the secret:
twoFa.disableFailed: Could not disable — check the code and password

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the interface and message language.

heartrate.title: Heart rate reading
heartrate.subtitle: Measurement durations offered to your clients.

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which events trigger an email.

calendar.title: Calendar & booking
calendar.slotsHint: Define your weekly hours before enabling client booking.
calendar.enableBooking: Enable booking via the client app
calendar.enableHelp: If disabled, clients cannot pick slots in the mobile app. You keep the Pro calendar.
calendar.scheduleIncomplete: Add at least one time range to enable booking.
calendar.vacationsReminder: Reminder: set vacations for the current year (or check “no vacation”).

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Clients linked to your practice.

create.title: Create client account
create.hint: The client must change their password on first app sign-in.

clients.emptyDescription: Clients will appear here once linked to your practice.

detail.title: Client profile
detail.subtitle: Pets and client record.
detail.petsEmptyDescription: This client has not registered any pets yet.
detail.sendAppLinkHint: An email with the petsFollow download link is sent to the client's address.
detail.sendAppLinkError: Could not send the link right now.

pet.title: Pet
pet.heartrateEmptyDescription: Validated BPM sessions will appear here.
pet.recentAlertBanner: The latest reading is flagged — clinical review recommended.
pet.timelineEmptyDescription: No monitoring events for this pet.
pet.photoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP — 2 MB max.
pet.careEmptyDescription: Create a reminder for vaccines, deworming and check-ups.
pet.visitsEmptyDescription: Requests and appointments will appear here.

invitations.title: Pending invitations
invitations.emptyDescription: Client↔practice link requests will appear here.

recommend.title: Refer a practice
recommend.subtitle: Introduce a colleague — your sales rep will follow up.
recommend.hint: The lead is sent to your assigned sales rep.
recommend.thanksBody: Your sales rep has received the lead and will contact the practice. Thank you for growing the petsFollow network.
recommend.error: Could not send (no sales rep assigned?).

requests.title: Requests
requests.subtitle: Client invitations and visit requests.
requests.linkEmptyDescription: Clients who invite you by email will appear here.
requests.visitsEmptyDescription: Appointments requested by clients will appear here.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your petsFollow Pro activity.
dashboard.aboutText: petsFollow Pro centralises cardiac monitoring, client records and secure messaging for your veterinary practice.

messages.title: Messaging
messages.subtitle: Secure exchanges with your clients.
messages.emptyDescription: Threads will appear when your clients message you.
messages.selectDescription: Choose a thread from the list to view messages.

commissions.title: Vet payouts
commissions.subtitle: Progressive commissions (max 12%) — editable rates. Monthly cycle.
commissions.tiersHint: Contiguous tiers starting at 1 client; last tier has no max (= open).
commissions.confirmClose: Close period {period}? Payout lines will be frozen.
commissions.confirmMarkReady: Mark all ready lines for period {period} as paid?
commissions.confirmMarkReadyMissing: Mark ready lines for {period} as paid? {n} line(s) remain blocked (missing info).
commissions.confirmMarkLinePaid: Mark this commission line as paid?
commissions.planRatesHint: Commercial rates are fixed by plan (ex-VAT): 8% annual · 12% triennial · 8% quinquennial · 10% addons — not editable here (see sheet above).

commercialBonuses.title: SPIFF bonuses
commercialBonuses.subtitle: Track practice ramp (€25) and triennial mix (€50/month) — manual payout.
commercialBonuses.confirmMarkPaid: Mark this SPIFF bonus as paid?

commercialCommissions.title: Sales payroll
commercialCommissions.subtitle: Forecast, to pay and paid — monthly recap with IBAN.
commercialCommissions.confirmClose: Close period {period} and move to “to pay”?
commercialCommissions.confirmMarkPaidMissingIban: Warning: at least one IBAN is missing. Mark {period} as paid anyway?

clientImport.title: Client import
clientImport.subtitle: Import a client list (CSV / Excel) for a veterinarian, with manual validation.
clientImport.mappingHint: Gemini can suggest a mapping; you must validate it before import.
clientImport.suggestOk: Mapping suggested by Gemini — review then apply.
clientImport.commitHint: Creates client accounts (temporary passwords). No emails or drip journey are sent.
clientImport.commitConfirm: Create ready client accounts? This cannot be undone.

commissions.title: My payouts
commissions.subtitle: Your earnings and payouts as a veterinarian.
commissions.payoutSchedule: Commission payments are made at the beginning of each month.
commissions.payoutIncompleteBanner: Complete your company and bank details so we can pay your commissions.

onboarding.title: Practice setup
onboarding.subtitle: A few steps to finish your profile — visible to clients and editable anytime in settings.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.

identity.text: Veterinarian name and practice name shown to your clients.

contact.label: Contact

contact.text: Email and phone so clients can reach you.

options.label: Options

options.text: Website (optional) and heart-rate reading durations offered to clients.

welcome.title: Your cardiac practice, ready to go
welcome.lead: petsFollow Pro supports you daily: heart rate readings, alerts, messaging and patient records — all {free}.

profile.title: Set up your practice profile
profile.text: Enter phone, address and contact email on your first login.

invite.title: Invite your clients
invite.text: Clients sign up via the petsFollow mobile app and join you automatically.

monitor.title: Monitor heart rate readings
monitor.text: Receive BPM data, validate sessions and intervene when alerted.

communicate.title: Communicate with ease
communicate.text: Built-in messaging with configurable availability status.

bpm.title: BPM readings
bpm.text: Guided cardiac monitoring for dogs and cats.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.text: Immediate notification when an anomaly is detected.

welcome.ctaTitle: Next step: set up your practice profile
welcome.ctaText: On first login, enter your practice details so clients can reach you easily.
welcome.ctaTitleAuthed: Next step: set up your practice profile
welcome.ctaTextAuthed: Your account is active. Enter your practice details so clients can reach you easily.

index.heroTitle: Cardiac monitoring for your patients, simplified
index.heroLead: petsFollow Pro centralises heart rate readings, client records and secure messaging in one tool built for veterinary practices.

heartrate.title: Guided heart rate readings
heartrate.text: Clients take BPM readings from the mobile app. You validate and track progress.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.text: Get notified immediately for tachycardia or detected anomalies.

messaging.title: Built-in messaging
messaging.text: Communicate with clients without leaving the platform. Configurable availability.

free.title: Free for vets
free.text: No practice subscription. petsFollow Pro is free for veterinary professionals.

security.title: Secure data
security.text: Compliant hosting, role-restricted access, encrypted messaging.

onboarding.title: Quick onboarding
onboarding.text: Register in 2 minutes, set up your practice profile on first access.

index.ctaText: The app is {free}. Your clients only pay for their pets' cardiac monitoring subscription.
index.productsLead: A clear grid to present vet-prescribed monitoring — no wearable, from about €2 / month per pet.

plans.title: Per-pet subscriptions
plans.text: Annual, Triennial (recommended) or Quinquennial — 15/30/60 s checks, messaging, timeline and reminders.

family.title: Family and Kennel
family.text: Family from 2 pets (−10%, no pet cap). Kennel from 6 (−15%, quick encode) — mutually exclusive.

careHorse.title: Care+ and Horse
careHorse.text: Care+ for medication and custom reminders; Horse for equine follow-up (farrier, contacts, competitions).

products.seoDescription: petsFollow subscription and addon grid for veterinary practice presentations.
products.title: petsFollow offers
products.lead: Present vet-prescribed cardiac monitoring to clients — no collar or device, simple pricing for the household.
products.positioning: petsFollow Pro is free for the practice. Only pet owners pay for monitoring (per-pet plan + household options).
products.includedLead: Whatever the plan (1, 3 or 5 years), owners get:
included: Guided heart-rate checks 15 / 30 / 60 s from the mobile app (no hardware)
Sessions sent to and validated by the practice
Secure client ↔ vet messaging + push notifications
Timeline / shared patient record (validated checks and conversations)
Standard care reminders (vaccine, deworming, check-up, dental)
products.plansLead: One subscription per monitored pet. Prices TTC — Annual / Triennial as one-time or Stripe subscription; Quinquennial one-time only.
products.plansTip: Presentation tip: lead with Triennial (€95 / 3 years ≈ €2.6/month) — best price / commitment balance for households.

annual.name: Annual
benefits: Entry plan — ideal to start one pet
All core pet monitoring benefits included

products.addonsLead: Addons are annual recurring subscriptions (renewed each year) — they enrich the experience for pets in the household under the rules below.
products.addonsTip: Family never replaces a pet subscription. Family and Kennel are exclusive (Kennel = upgrade). Kennel from 6 pets. Horse only if the household has ≥ 1 horse.

family.name: Family
family.tagline: Household pack — from 2 pets, −10% on plans
benefits: −10% on pet plans from the 2nd paying pet
Exclusive with Kennel — from 6 pets, Kennel upgrade recommended

horse.name: Horse
benefits: Offered only if the household has ≥ 1 horse

kennel.name: Kennel
benefits: −15% on pet plans from the 2nd paying pet
Exclusive with Family (Kennel purchase = upgrade, Family cancelled)

family.name: Family
family.role: Household addon from 2 (−10%, no cap, exclusive Kennel)

profileForm.payoutHint: Details required to prepare and pay your commission statements.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: These terms govern the use of petsFollow Pro by veterinarians and the mobile app by pet owners. The app enables heart rate measurement, history review and communication with the practice.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: petsFollow processes personal data (name, email, readings, messages) to provide cardiac monitoring. Data is retained for the lifetime of the account. Contact support{'@'}petsfollow.test for GDPR requests.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.body: Publisher: petsFollow. Contact: support{'@'}petsfollow.test. Hosting: GDPR-compliant cloud infrastructure.

errors.invalid_image_type: Unsupported format (JPEG, PNG, WebP, MP4, MOV, WebM)

errors.family_pet_limit: Family pack is limited to 3 pets
errors.family_requires_two_pets: Family pack requires at least 2 pets
errors.use_google_sign_in: This account uses Google — sign in with Google.

errors.payout_not_closed: Close the period before marking it paid
errors.payout_line_not_ready: This line is not ready to pay (missing info or already paid)
errors.payout_no_ready_lines: No ready-to-pay lines in this period
errors.google_pro_only: Google access reserved for Pro profiles.
errors.email_not_verified: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.payment_required: Active subscription required for this pet
errors.email_already_exists: An account already exists with this email
errors.google_account_mismatch: This Google account is already linked to another user

dashboard.title: Sales dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Assigned vets, prospect pipeline and commissions.

vets.title: Assigned veterinarians
vets.subtitle: Create a vet account automatically assigned to you.

clients.hint: The client must change their password on first sign-in.

commissions.title: My commissions
commissions.subtitle: Plan-based rates on ex-VAT (8 / 12 / 8%) — push triennial.
commissions.ibanBanner: Enter your IBAN to receive your commissions.

pitch.title: petsFollow overview
pitch.subtitle: Web vet app + Flutter mobile app and commission scheme.
pitch.vetGrid: Vet: 7% → 12% ex-VAT by paying-client volume, with plan factor (annual / triennial / quinquennial).
pitch.addons: Addons Family / Kennel: 10% sales + 5% vet. Care+ / Horse: 10% sales, 0% vet.
mobileFeatures: Family / Kennel / Care+ / Horse addons with real privileges
pitch.commercialFlat: Sales: 8% / 12% / 8% ex-VAT by plan (annual / triennial / quinquennial); ~€9.4 on the €95 TTC triennial plan.

commissionSheet.htvaNote: Commissions are calculated on the ex-VAT amount (BE VAT 21%). Client/Stripe prices are TTC.
commissionSheet.leadVet: Your earnings: progressive grid by client volume and plan.
commissionSheet.leadCommercial: Your introducer commissioning, plus the vet grid for co-selling pitches.
commissionSheet.leadAdmin: Full model overview: vet + sales + SPIFF bonuses + margin guardrails.
commissionSheet.vetBaseExplain: Base rate by number of paying clients linked to your practice:
commissionSheet.vetMaxExplain: That base rate is then scaled by plan (100% on Triennial, 67% on Annual and Quinquennial), and capped at 12%. The table shows the maximum at the 61+ client tier — your actual rate may be lower on an earlier tier.
commissionSheet.vetAddonNote: Family and Kennel: 5% ex-VAT for the vet. Care+ and Horse: 0% vet (10% sales only).
commissionSheet.coSellNote: Vets are not penalised when you are assigned — win-win co-selling.
commissionSheet.adminGuardrails: Guardrails: net margin ≥ 55% of TTC · core net/year ≥ €17 · max partner take rate 24% HT.

bonusHints.vet_tier_31: €50 one-shot when first reaching 31 paying clients.
bonusHints.commercial_ramp: €25 when 5 paid pets activate within 60 days under an assigned vet.
bonusHints.commercial_mix: €50 / month if ≥ 55% of the month’s activations are triennial.

commissionSheet.discountNote: Euro amounts are full-price indicatives. Household/kennel discounts (−10% / −15%) reduce the HT base actually collected.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Appointment requests and practice schedule.
calendar.bookingDisabledHint: Client booking via the app is disabled. Enable it in Settings.
calendar.pendingEmptyDescription: Client requests and reschedules awaiting your action will appear here.
